stale_before.summary: Pre-game / low-activity tracked marks could stay stale indefinitely after reconnect because WebSocket only delivers delta price_change events and no REST fallback existed.

stale_after.summary: Code path now polls Polymarket CLOB REST inline for marks older than 30s, throttled to once per 20s per slug, then re-snapshots state_hub. Runtime verification is pending operator restart because this task forbids process restart here.

rollback.method: Remove the module-level REST fallback constants/lock map, remove _poll_stale_mark(), and remove the _to_poll fallback block from _stream_positions_mark().
